svg.text: one tiering policy + caching for the whole suite
Every product draws from one library:
Skill packs — methods, policies, document skills
Build a skill once → every function gets it
→ customization = swap a SKILL.md, not a rebuild

svg.text: ① One platform — every 1 Suite product runs on enterprise1: shared identity, data, skills & governance.
② Unified governance — one policy, guardrail & approval framework across every function.
③ Cross-function orchestration — an event in one product can drive action in another, safely.
④ One control plane — a single pane to observe, evaluate, manage & cost every agent.
⑤ Wave rollout — adopt function by function; eval-gated migrations keep the suite on the best model.
⑥ Total control — SSO, RBAC, residency & an immutable org-wide audit: the agentic enterprise, governed.
